5 Having read and considered all the papers in support of and in opposition to the

8 IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THE TENTATIVE RULING IS CONFIRMED:

9 1. The demurrer of the individual defendants B J Johnson, Dena Davis, and Nicole
10 || Bohn (“Individuals”) to all six causes of action of the Complaint is sustained in its entirety.
11 || Their demurrer is sustained WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to the third and fourth causes
12 . of action. Their demurrer is sustained WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the first, second, fifth
13 || and sixth causes of action.

14 2. The demurrer of all defendants (including the Individuals and the Trustees of
15 || University of San Francisco and University of San Francisco) to the fifth and sixth causes of
16 || action is sustained in its entirety, WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.
17 3. Plaintiff's ordered to file and serve a first amended complaint in conformity with
18 || this Order within /S_ days.
